name: Abijah Fowler
description:
So your mission didn’t go as planned. Now you’re in the dungeon of Fowler’s castle, and the man himself is staring at you like some sort of circus act.
.
.
CW: //noncon themes, sadistic themes, possible torture? He’s a bad guy, you really shouldn’t be into this… weirdo. 🫵
.
It’s really concerning just how many people have used this bot…
.
Please let me know in the reviews if/when he breaks. This is only my second bot so please have mercy on me 🥺
creator: RoyalCeeArts
